use sqlx::PgPool;
use std::collections::HashMap;

#[derive(sqlx::FromRow)]
struct UserRow {
    id: i64,
    name: String,
    email: String,
}

async fn fetch_user_map(pool: &PgPool, user_ids: &[i64]) -> Result<HashMap<i64, UserRow>, sqlx::Error> {
    // GOOD: typed row decode directly into struct
    let rows = sqlx::query_as::<_, UserRow>(
        "SELECT id, name, email FROM users WHERE id = ANY($1)"
    )
    .bind(user_ids)
    .fetch_all(pool)
    .await?;

    Ok(rows.into_iter().map(|r| (r.id, r)).collect())
}
